metadata.description: Bloom — a personal AI tutor (Bloom's 2-sigma) as a Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: bloom
plugins.description: A personal AI tutor based on Bloom's 2-sigma research: it generates a structured syllabus, teaches one adaptive lesson at a time, and tailors each next lesson to the learner's highlights and feedback. Bundles bloom-tutor plus six learn-* skills.
